summary: Iteration 58 - Vehicle Pricing Tiers Feature Testing. Backend APIs 100% working. Frontend VehiclePricingManager fixed and now renders in admin vehicle edit modal. VehiclePricingDisplay on booking page NOT rendering despite API returning pricing_tiers correctly - requires main agent investigation.

ui_bugs.issue: Component not rendering on booking page even though API returns pricing_tiers correctly. The vehicle store receives the data but the component conditional {vehicle.pricing_tiers?.length > 0 && ...} is not triggering render.

integration_issues.issue: VehiclePricingDisplay not showing on /booking/{vehicleId} page. API returns pricing_tiers (verified via curl and network intercept), but component doesn't render. Zustand store may not be properly passing pricing_tiers to component.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix VehiclePricingDisplay not rendering on booking page - API returns pricing_tiers but component doesn't show
Debug why vehicle.pricing_tiers is not available in booking page component despite API returning it
Check if Zustand store selectedVehicle is properly including pricing_tiers field
critical_code_review_comments: VehiclePricingManager was missing from EditVehicleModal.tsx JSX - fixed by adding it after Photos section
Vehicle interface in vehicleStore.ts was missing pricing_tiers field - fixed by adding PricingTier interface and pricing_tiers?: PricingTier[] field
Booking page uses vehicle from Zustand store but pricing_tiers may not be properly hydrated
seed_data_creation: Added 5 pricing tiers to vehicle fd354ff5-2aa6-421d-86f0-94016b1b1669 (Toyota Yaris Hybrid) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pricing tiers APIs fully working. Admin VehiclePricingManager in edit modal now renders (scroll down in modal to see it). Client booking page VehiclePricingDisplay NOT rendering - this is the main issue to fix. The API returns pricing_tiers correctly but the React component doesn't render.
rca_of_the_issue: VehiclePricingDisplay not rendering: 1) API returns pricing_tiers correctly (verified via curl), 2) Network intercept shows pricing_tiers in response, 3) Component conditional check {vehicle.pricing_tiers?.length > 0} not triggering, 4) Possible cause: Zustand store not properly hydrating pricing_tiers to selectedVehicle, or component not re-rendering when store updates
